task_objective: Fix selection jumping away after backup/restore operations and drop redundant [DEBUG] prefix on forwarded debug logs.
tests_added: resolveRefreshedSelection test suite (returns preferred game, current selection, first game, none)
design_decisions: Extracted selection logic into pure helper resolveRefreshedSelection. Updated applyRefreshResult and applyCachedRefreshResult to only allow Steam context selection on initial load, defaulting to preserving the current selected game for manual operations.
results: Both bugs fixed. Tests added and passing. Quality gates passed.
